task_completion.description: The system font size is set to the largest possible setting and left that way at the end of the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Android Settings 'Font size' slider at the maximum level, and subsequent screens (including the final screenshots) show noticeably huge text in the status bar or system UI.

task_completion.description: The Flight Crew View app is opened and navigated to the Friends list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the Flight Crew View app interface with a 'Friends' header, tab, or list of friends visible.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the Friends list is saved to /sdcard/large_text_test.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., `screencap -p /sdcard/large_text_test.png`, `ls /sdcard/`) or a file manager app shows that the file `large_text_test.png` was created in the /sdcard/ directory.

task_completion.description: A text file named readability_result.txt is created in /sdcard/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., `echo ... > /sdcard/readability_result.txt`, `ls /sdcard/`) or a file manager shows the file `readability_result.txt` exists.

task_completion.description: The readability result file contains the correct evaluation string.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (like `cat /sdcard/readability_result.txt`) or a text editor shows the contents of the file as exactly 'READABLE: YES' or 'READABLE: NO'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Flight Crew View app GUI to reach the Friends list.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the app's menus (e.g., menu > Friends) rather than bypassing the UI entirely.

integrity.description: The agent viewed the Friends list with the large font applied before creating the result file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the font size being increased, followed by the app being opened to the Friends list, and ONLY THEN the readability_result.txt file being created.

integrity.description: The screenshot saved is an actual capture of the device screen showing the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a command like `screencap` or a built-in screenshot tool while the Flight Crew View Friends list is actively visible on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is 'Flight Crew View' (package: com.robert.fcView), an aviation crew scheduling app. The Friends feature is accessible via the app's menu > Friends. The expected output paths are standard Android storage locations: /sdcard/large_text_test.png and /sdcard/readability_result.txt.
